title: Microbiome Antibiotics Impact
script_summary: Exploring the complex effects of antibiotics on our microbiome reveals surprising truths.

segments.voiceover: Science has a clearer story about microbiome antibiotics impact than social media does.
Antibiotics save lives but can disrupt gut bacteria, our microbiome's ecosystem.
This disruption may lead to digestive issues, allergies, and even obesity!
Studies show a link between antibiotics and reduced diversity in gut bacteria.
But not all antibiotics affect everyone the same way—individual responses vary.
Want to keep your microbiome healthy? Talk to your doctor about antibiotics.

But not all antibiotics affect everyone the same way—individual responses vary. Want to keep your microbiome healthy? Talk to your doctor about antibiotics.
